decision.rationale: The source produced a real narrow dependency-boundary rule pattern, but the exact dw-state facade-only importer boundary requested for this slice is false in current repo truth.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: Current repo truth contradicts the requested boundary: shared/lib/dw-state/runtime.ts legitimately imports shared/lib/dw-state/shared.ts, so a rule allowing only shared/lib/dw-state.ts to import both private files would be false as written.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the boundary-rule pattern remains valuable as Engine structure guidance even without a runtime surface
